title: About
subtitle: Learn more about Story Hook.
heading: About Story Hook
body: Story Hook is a curated catalog of Asian dramas with reviews, cast details, ratings, and story synopses. Browse the collection, search with advanced filters, and explore drama details — all in your preferred language.
featureBrowse: Browse curated Asian dramas with cover art and ratings
featureSearch: Advanced search by keyword, country, rating, episodes, and year
featureDetail: Full detail pages with synopsis, cast, photos, and watch links
featureI18n: Multilingual interface in English, Chinese, Thai, Korean, and Myanmar
